name: Magnolia Bostad AB (publ)
summary: Magnolia Bostad AB (publ), through its subsidiaries, acquires and develops properties into rental and tenant-owned apartments, hotels, residential care homes, and community service properties. It also provides property management services. The company was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden. Magnolia Bostad AB (publ) is a subsidiary of F. Holmstr√É¬∂m Fastigheter AB.
